ksa_text: Establish and operate stakeholder engagement and feedback mechanisms for AI governance, including affected community identification, external feedback collection, adjudication of conflicting input, and integration of stakeholder perspectives into governance decisions.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on scope grounds: AI Governance (affinity 0.82) with insufficient REG signals (1). Composite minimal (0.0000). AIMS Manager interprets and applies regulatory requirements; does not build systems, deliver training curricula, or develop business cases.
